hero.title: Choose your display tone
hero.subtitle: Dark default · bright secondary tone
hero.speech: The main graph always keeps the dark sky so stars and links stay crisp.

font.title: Font

readable.label: Readable font
readable.sub: A smooth font that is easier on the eyes

font.useFontHint: Applies the selected font to titles and text on this device.

performance.title: Performance

full.label: Full effects
full.sub: Every motion, glow, and background character

lite.label: Lite mode
lite.sub: Calms motion and effects so older phones stay smooth

performance.usePerformanceHint: Applies the selected performance setting on this device.

actions.useThemeHint: Applies the selected theme on this device.

note: The main graph stays dark even in light mode. It is the background where stars and connections read best.
